auth.subtitle: Sign in with Google or receive a magic link by email.
auth.magicDescription: We will email you a one-time link. It expires after a short time.
auth.magicSentBody: We sent a sign-in link. You can close this tab after you finish signing in.
auth.legalNotice: Waryt CRM — by continuing you agree to use this app only for authorized work.
auth.magicLinkConfigError: Supabase is not configured in this build.
auth.magicLinkNetworkHint: Check NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY in .env.local, restart the dev server, and confirm redirect URLs in the Supabase dashboard.
auth.magicLinkUnexpectedError: Something went wrong sending the link.
